items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training (CE-URT) is systematically confirmed in clinical populations, enhancing force production in the contralateral untrained limb. This supports training the uninjured side to maintain or improve function in the affected limb during unilateral injury or immobilization, offering a novel strategy in rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体效应量数字，也未提及证据分级。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect size numbers or mention evidence grading.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for stroke survivors in the US, showing IRFs to be more cost-effective from a payer perspective by simulating 90-day outcomes, including mortality and community discharge.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医疗支付方的角度来看，卒中后急性期康复，入住康复医院（IRF）比技能护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益。这为你与支付方沟通，以及为患者选择康复路径提供了有力的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方角度看卒中急性后期康复的成本效益：康复医院与技能护理机构。
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型评估了美国卒中幸存者入住康复医院（IRF）与技能护理机构（SNF）进行急性后期康复的成本效益，通过模拟 90 天结局（包括死亡率和社区出院率），显示 IRF 从支付方角度更具成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a US healthcare payer perspective, inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) are more cost-effective than skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation. This provides strong evidence to support your discussions with payers and choices for patient rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型假设和输入数据的准确性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a decision analytic model for simulation, and results depend on the accuracy of model assumptions and input data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A systematic review of 22 studies identified psychological and social impacts as key psychosocial effects of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, affecting 645 informants.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响远超生理层面，会严重影响患者情绪和社会参与。你需要将这些非生理因素纳入评估和干预计划，以提供更全面的康复支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据综合。
items.summaryZh: 一项对 22 项研究的系统综述发现，心理和社会影响是卒中后吞咽困难的关键社会心理效应，影响了 645 名信息提供者。
items.curatedReasonEn: The psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties extend beyond physical impairment, significantly affecting emotional well-being and social participation. Incorporate these non-physical factors into your assessment and intervention plans to provide more holistic rehabilitation support.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量和综合证据的确定性未在摘要中明确报告。
items.limitationEn: Methodological quality of included studies and certainty of synthesized evidence were not explicitly reported in the abstract.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (n=333) found that sarcopenia significantly increased the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF).
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症会增加 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。在评估 ACDF 术后患者时，务必考虑肌少症这一风险因素，并加强相关干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（n=333）发现，肌少症显著增加了颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). When evaluating post-ACDF patients, it is crucial to consider sarcopenia as a risk factor and strengthen related interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may be subject to selection bias and data completeness issues.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure intervention significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能显著改善机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。这提示你可以在长期护理机构中，将体感游戏作为一种低成本、多益处的干预手段，以综合管理肌少症。
items.titleZh: 机构养老老年肌少症患者体感游戏的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 这项务实准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure 体感游戏干预显著改善了机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention significantly improves physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. This suggests you can integrate exergaming into long-term care facilities as a low-cost, multi-benefit intervention for comprehensive sarcopenia management.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验性设计，非随机化，可能存在选择偏倚和无法完全控制混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This study used a quasi-experimental design, which is non-randomized and may be subject to selection bias and unaddressed confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers were significantly associated with lower physical activity levels.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、功能受限和活动障碍与体力活动水平呈负相关。在临床评估肥胖女性的体力活动水平时，要综合考虑这些因素，才能制定更精准的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力。
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性进行的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与较低的体力活动水平显著相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, functional limitations, and perceived barriers are negatively associated with physical activity in women with obesity. When assessing physical activity levels in obese women, consider these factors holistically to develop more precise intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study examined the application of Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) for home-living stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation center, reporting on recruitment, dose, fidelity, and perceived value.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法在丹麦社区神经康复环境中对卒中幸存者是可行的。这提示你可以考虑将此方法引入你的神经康复实践，尤其是在认知功能相对完好的居家卒中患者中。
items.titleZh: 认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用的初步可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项可行性研究评估了认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复中心对居家卒中幸存者的应用，报告了招募、剂量、依从性和感知价值等方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation setting. This suggests you could consider incorporating this method into your neurorehabilitation practice, particularly for home-dwelling stroke patients with relatively intact cognitive function.
items.limitation: 本研究为单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-group pre-post design, lacking a control group to evaluate the intervention's actual efficacy.
